title: Add tests for IngestStateDB
description: Create tests/test_ingest_state.py with pytest unit tests for IngestStateDB (codecompass/index/ingest_state.py). Cover: storing and retrieving a hash via get_hash, bulk hash storage via set_hashes_bulk, unchanged file returns same hash, changed file detected when hash differs, get_all_paths returns correct set, delete_paths removes entries. Use tmp_path fixture for the DB path.

title: Add streaming to OllamaProvider
description: Add stream_complete() to OllamaProvider in codecompass/providers/llm_ollama.py. Use httpx streaming: send POST to /v1/chat/completions with json field 'stream': True. Use httpx.stream() context manager, iterate response.iter_lines(), skip empty lines and '[DONE]' lines, parse each line as JSON and yield choices[0]['delta']['content'] when it is non-empty. Handle ConnectError the same way complete() does.

title: Add --output-format json flag to codecompass ask
description: Add --output-format option (choices: text, json; default: text) to the ask command in codecompass/cli/main.py. When 'json', skip all Rich formatting and instead print a JSON object to stdout: {"answer": "...", "citations": [{"path": "...", "start_line": N, "end_line": N}]}. Streaming still works the same way internally; accumulate the full text then print JSON at the end.

title: Add `codecompass clear` command
description: Add a 'clear' CLI command in codecompass/cli/main.py. Usage: codecompass clear <repo-name>. Steps: (1) delete the ChromaDB collection named codecompass_<repo>, (2) call state_db.delete_paths() for all paths in that repo from ingest_hashes.db, (3) call graph_db methods to remove all nodes/edges for that repo. Add --all flag to wipe every repo. Prompt for confirmation with click.confirm() unless --yes is passed.

title: Add retry logic to ClaudeCodeProvider
description: Wrap the subprocess.run() call in ClaudeCodeProvider.complete() with tenacity retry. Retry up to 3 times with wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=2, max=10) on RuntimeError, but NOT when the error message contains 'API key' or 'not found' (those are permanent failures). Import tenacity (already in pyproject.toml dependencies). Do the same for stream_complete() around the Popen call.

title: Show per-language chunk count in ingest summary
description: In _do_ingest in codecompass/cli/main.py, after all steps complete, compute a breakdown of chunks by language using collections.Counter on [c.language for c in chunks]. Add it to the final Panel message. Format: sorted by count descending, e.g. 'python: 1234  javascript: 567  go: 89'.

title: Support .codecompassignore file during ingest
description: In codecompass/ingest/walker.py, load a .codecompassignore file from the repo root if it exists. Use the pathspec library (already a dependency) with pathspec.GitWildMatchPattern to parse it. During the file walk, skip any file whose path matches the patterns. Fall back gracefully if the file does not exist.

title: Add streaming to OpenAICompatProvider
description: Add stream_complete() to OpenAICompatProvider in codecompass/providers/llm_openai_compat.py using httpx streaming. Mirror the same SSE parsing pattern used in OllamaProvider: POST /chat/completions with stream=True, iterate iter_lines(), parse JSON, yield choices[0]['delta']['content'] when non-empty, stop on [DONE]. Reuse the same headers dict (Authorization + Content-Type).

title: Add `codecompass list` command
description: Add a 'list' CLI command in codecompass/cli/main.py. It reads ingest_hashes.db via IngestStateDB to get all unique repos and their file counts. Queries graph.db via GraphDB.stats() for node/edge counts per repo. Displays a Rich Table with columns: Repo, Files indexed, Graph nodes, Graph edges. Handle the case where the data dir or DBs don't exist yet (print helpful message).

title: Add `codecompass graph export` subcommand for DOT format
description: Add an 'export' subcommand under the 'graph' group in codecompass/cli/main.py. Usage: codecompass graph export <repo> [--output graph.dot]. Query GraphDB for all nodes and edges for the given repo. Emit Graphviz DOT format: digraph { node1 -> node2 [label="imports"]; ... }. Use node symbol_name or path as the label. Write to --output file or stdout if omitted.

title: Warn when BM25 index is stale
description: In the ask command in codecompass/cli/main.py, after loading the BM25 index, compare its mtime to ingest_hashes.db mtime using Path.stat().st_mtime. If BM25 is older than the hash store (meaning ingest ran but BM25 wasn't updated), print a rich yellow warning: 'BM25 index may be stale — run codecompass ingest to refresh.' Only warn, don't block.

title: Add HyDE option to hybrid search
description: In codecompass/retrieve/hybrid.py, add an optional parameter hyde_llm (type LLMProvider | None = None). When provided, before embedding the query, call hyde_llm.complete() with the prompt: 'Write a short code snippet (10-20 lines) that would directly answer this question: {query}\nCode:'. Embed the returned snippet instead of the raw query. This bridges the vocabulary gap between natural-language questions and code. Update Answerer.answer() and stream_answer() to pass self._llm as hyde_llm when config has a new retrieval.hyde boolean flag (default False).

title: Add 10 more golden questions for the requests library eval set
description: Add 10 more high-quality entries to codecompass/eval/golden/requests_golden.json. Each entry must match the existing schema: {"question": "...", "relevant_paths": ["requests/..."], "reference_answer": "..."}. Cover topics not already in the file: hooks system, HTTPAdapter and mount(), PreparedRequest, send() method, resolve_redirects(), stream=True parameter, cert verification, proxies dict, event hooks, and ConnectionError handling.

title: Add --verbose flag to codecompass ingest
description: Add --verbose/-v flag to the ingest command in codecompass/cli/main.py. When set, print each file path as it is chunked (one line per file: '  chunking: path/to/file.py (N chunks)'). This requires grouping chunks by path after ingest_repo() returns. Also log the total time taken for the embedding step in verbose mode.

title: Show context token usage in ask output
description: After retrieval in the ask command (codecompass/cli/main.py), print a dim line showing how many tokens were packed vs the budget: e.g. '[dim]Context: 3241/6000 tokens from 8 chunks[/dim]'. Compute the token count by summing the embed_text() lengths of the packed results using the existing _count_tokens helper imported from answerer. Print this before the answer rule line.
